description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a UnitTest job that uses the python:3.6 Docker image, runs a before_script that adds the Google Chrome apt repository, installs unzip, google-chrome-stable, xvfb, downloads and unzips chromedriver 2.43, installs Python dependencies from requirements.txt, runs Django makemigrations and migrate, collects static files, and starts the Django development server in the background; then the script runs coverage run --include='*_page/*' manage.py test followed by coverage report -m, and the job runs on_success. In the deploy stage add a Deployment job that uses the ruby:2.4 image, runs a before_script that installs the dpl gem and the Heroku CLI, sets the environment name to production with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST, and the script executes dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY, exports HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY, and runs heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate. Both jobs inherit the global stages order and no explicit rules are defined, so Deployment runs after successful tests.
